biography: Tyriq Leshon Withers (born July 15, 1998) is an American actor. Wither began acting in 2019, appearing in short films and episodic television series such as The CW's Legacies, Tell Me Lies, and The Game. In 2022, Withers broke out as "Aaron" in an episode of Donald Glover's FX comedic-drama Atlanta titled "Rich Wigga, Poor Wigga".
name: Tyriq Withers
